zh.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth是Wentworth和Mrs Wentworth的女兒，於1365年1月9日出生在英國英格蘭肯特。她於1388年與John Lovelace III在英國肯特貝黑斯達結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1418年1月9日在英國肯特貝黑斯達享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth是Wentworth和Mrs Wentworth的女儿，于1365年1月9日出生在英国英格兰肯特。她于1388年与John Lovelace III在英国肯特貝黑斯達结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1418年1月9日在英国肯特貝黑斯達享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth was born on 9 January 1365, in Kent, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Wentworth and Mrs Wentworth. She married John Lovelace III in 1388, in Bethersden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 January 1418, in Bethersden, Kent, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth est née le 9 janvier 1365, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Wentworth et Mrs Wentworth. Elle a épousé John Lovelace III en 1388, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1418, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth wurde am 9. Januar 1365 in Kent, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Wentworth und Mrs Wentworth geboren. Sie hat 1388 in Bethersden, Kent, England John Lovelace III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1418 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Bethersden, Kent, England und wurde in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth è nata il il 9 gennaio 1365 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Wentworth e Mrs Wentworth. Lei sposato John Lovelace III nel 1388, nel Bethersden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 gennaio 1418, nel Bethersden, Kent, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Bethersden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworthは1365年1月9日にイギリスイギリスケントでWentworthとMrs Wentworthの娘として生まれた。1388年にイギリスケントベスエルスデンでJohn Lovelace IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1418年1月9日にイギリスケントベスエルスデンで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントベスエルスデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth(은)는 1365년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Wentworth(와)과 Mrs Wentworth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 John Lovelace III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1418년 1월 9일 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베더즈든에 묻혔다.

pt.9 January 1365–9 January 1418: 9 de janeiro de 1365–9 de janeiro de 1418
pt.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1365, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Wentworth e Mrs Wentworth. Ela casou-se com John Lovelace III em 1388, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1418, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth родилась 9 января 1365 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Wentworth и Mrs Wentworth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Lovelace III в 1388 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 января 1418 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.9 January 1365–9 January 1418: 9 de enero de 1365–9 de enero de 1418
es.lifeSummary: Johanna Ann Wentworth nació el 9 de enero de 1365, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Wentworth y Mrs Wentworth. Se casó con John Lovelace III en 1388, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de enero de 1418, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
